text:

Log:
  GEOM label: strip leading/trailing space synthesizing devfs names

  %20%20%20 is ugly and doesn't really help make human-readable devfs names.

  PR:		243318
  Reported by:	Peter Eriksson <pen AT lysator.liu.se>
  Relnotes:	yes
